scenario: System hangs with rcu_sched CPU stall, hung task, and soft lockup after kernel update with drbd module
symptoms: INFO: task rpm:2874 blocked for more than 120 seconds
watchdog: BUG: soft lockup - CPU#3 stuck for 22s! [sshd:4823]

workflow.thought: Check the version of the running kernel
Set context to the drbd worker task
Get backtrace of all active tasks on each CPU
Check filesystem details for drbd.ko symlink
Check filesystem details for actual drbd.ko file
Examine inode details of actual module file

root_cause_analysis: The fix of kABI breakage in struct pv_mmu_ops reported via Private Bug ID: #2144161#2152206 has a side effect on third-party kernel modules built on top of RHEL-8.7 GA kernel version 4.18.0-425.3.1.el8.
The version of the third-party module [drbd] linked to the kernel version 4.18.0-425.10.1.el8_7 or higher is incompatible.
The [drbd] kernel module file inside 4.18.0-425.10.1.el8_7.x86_64/weak-updates/drbd directory is a symlink to the [drbd] kernel module inside 4.18.0-425.3.1.el8.x86_64/extra/drbd directory.
